issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.fortnite.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.fortnite.com) ### Comment > Bonjour, > > J'utilise la version payante de AdGuard, le bloqueur de publicité, sur Windows. > > Ce logiciel permet également d'activer une protection DNS. Cette protection DNS crée des problèmes chez moi. > > Quand je sélectionne et active le DNS "AdGuard DNS", cela crée un problème dans le jeu Fortnite, et il est impossible de trouver une partie. La recherche tourne dans le vide et après quelques minutes, un message dans le jeu indique qu'il y a un problème de communication avec le serveur et cela recommence ainsi en boucle. > > Si je désactive la protection DNS, tout marche sans souci, si je réactive la protection DNS avec le DNS AdGuard, cela ne marche de nouveau plus. > > Je viens également de constater que quand le DNS "AdGuard DNS" est activé, l'application AdGuard de bureau (Windows) elle-même n'est pas en mesure de rechercher les mises à jour, si je désactive le DNS "AdGuard DNS", la vérification de mise à jour ne rencontre aucun problème. Avec le DNS activé un message indique : "Impossible de vérifier les mises à jour - Veillez vérifier votre connexion internet ou réessayez plus tard" > > J'ai tenté d'envoyer un message au support depuis l'application de bureau, je ne pouvais même pas a envoyer le message si DNS AdGuard est activé, j'ai été obligé de désactiver ce DNS pour que le message soit envoyé. > Avec le DNS activé, j'avais ce message d'erreur : "Le délai d'attente de l'opération a expiré" > > En vous remerciant pour votre aide. ### Screenshots

comment.body:
Hello @Alex-302 ,

Indeed, IPv6 was enabled on my PC, so I disabled IPv6, and it seems to have worked.

However, at the same time, AdGuard made me download the new version: 7.22.4 (5257).

So, I was not sure if modifying IPv6 was the cause of resolving the issue, so I re-enabled IPv6 to test, and it is still working fine now.

Maybe the new version of AdGuard includes a fix for the problem I was experiencing up until then? Do you have any information about this?

In any case, I have re-enabled IPv6, and I have restarted the PC several times to be sure, but the problem (probably thanks to the AdGuard update) seems resolved.

I think this topic can be closed. I will not hesitate to post a message here again if the problem comes back.

In the meantime, thank you for the efforts you have made to help me :)

Have a nice day

issue.title: www.karaokemanekineko.jp
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.karaokemanekineko.jp/contact/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.karaokemanekineko.jp%2Fcontact%2F) ### Comment > まねきねこアプリを起動しようとすると7100エラーによって阻まれる。 > 朝一番など1回は7500エラー一度だけで開く場合があるが、2度目からは阻止されるので、複数パターンの広告ブロック回避法があると思われる。 > さらに、アプリ内のポケまねというゲームコーナーでは、Adguardを起動しているとコーナー自体が開かないか、広告再生に失敗しました、とでて報酬は受け取れない。 > 広告とは、記事を読むなど基本報酬に対して対価として要求されるものだから、広告という嫌がらせを見ないで報酬を受け取れるようにするのは、広告ブロックアプリの使命。 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/z99whu9h5f4o40c4kg80cssg4wso48cyhuh3ribo08.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.karaokemanekineko.jp/contact/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.karaokemanekineko.jp%2Fcontact%2F) ### Comment > まねきねこアプリを起動しようとすると7100エラーによって阻まれる。 > 朝一番など1回は7500エラー一度だけで開く場合があるが、2度目からは阻止されるので、複数パターンの広告ブロック回避法があると思われる。 > さらに、アプリ内のポケまねというゲームコーナーでは、Adguardを起動しているとコーナー自体が開かないか、広告再生に失敗しました、とでて報酬は受け取れない。 > 広告とは、記事を読むなど基本報酬に対して対価として要求されるものだから、広告という嫌がらせを見ないで報酬を受け取れるようにするのは、広告ブロックアプリの使命。 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/z99whu9h5f4o40c4kg80cssg4wso48cyhuh3ribo08.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/n9jvwbobk5c48gogg4gg484w8oosoww6ial6wzn8a8.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.3 System version: | `Android 14` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Tracking protection: | **General settings**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180),
Self-destructing first-party cookies (4320)

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.cloudflare.com/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/android/filters/15_optimized.txt` Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Mobile Ads,
AdGuard Base

issue.title: omronconnect.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://omronconnect.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fomronconnect.com) ### Comment > Omron Connect というアプリ内の「コンテンツ」が見えなくなった。 > 2月28日午後6時ごろにAdGuard のフィルターを更新したら、それが見えなくなってしまった。当日の朝は問題なく表示されていた。 > 「DNS通信を保護」をオンにするとその問題が発生する。 > 直近の「アクティビティ」からブロックされたものをホワイトリストに入れてみるも解決できなかった ### Screenshots

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973
